# Shiny.NET

> A collection of 30+ open-source .NET libraries for mobile, desktop, and server development. 40M+ NuGet downloads. AOT-ready. Built and maintained by Allan Ritchie (8x Microsoft MVP). Covers Bluetooth LE, background jobs, push notifications, GPS, geofencing, mediator pattern, MAUI toolkit, document databases, spatial data, dependency injection, and more.

## Client Libraries

- [Architecture](https://www.shinylib.net/client/architecture): Core architecture and design concepts for Shiny Client cross-platform framework
- [MAUI Hosting](https://www.shinylib.net/client/hosting/maui): Setting up Shiny in a .NET MAUI application
- [Native Hosting](https://www.shinylib.net/client/hosting/native): Setting up Shiny in native iOS/Android projects
- [Manual Hosting](https://www.shinylib.net/client/hosting/manual): Manual Shiny hosting configuration
- [Uno Platform Hosting](https://www.shinylib.net/client/hosting/uno): Setting up Shiny in an Uno Platform application
- [Release Notes](https://www.shinylib.net/client/release-notes): Shiny Client release notes and changelog

### Bluetooth LE

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/client/ble): Introduction to Shiny BluetoothLE for scanning, connecting, and communicating with BLE peripherals
- [BLE Manager](https://www.shinylib.net/client/ble/manager): Managing BLE adapter state, scanning, and peripheral discovery
- [Peripheral](https://www.shinylib.net/client/ble/peripheral): Connecting to and interacting with BLE peripherals
- [Services/Characteristics/Descriptors](https://www.shinylib.net/client/ble/gatt): Working with GATT services, characteristics, and descriptors
- [Background Operations](https://www.shinylib.net/client/ble/background): Running BLE operations in the background on iOS and Android
- [Best Practices/FAQ](https://www.shinylib.net/client/ble/best-practices): BLE best practices, troubleshooting, and frequently asked questions

### Bluetooth LE Hosting

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/client/blehosting): Setting up a BLE GATT server to advertise and serve data
- [GATT Service](https://www.shinylib.net/client/blehosting/gatt): Configuring GATT services and characteristics for BLE hosting

### Jobs

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/client/jobs/): Introduction to background job scheduling with Shiny Jobs
- [Create a Job](https://www.shinylib.net/client/jobs/create): Defining and registering background jobs
- [Managing Jobs](https://www.shinylib.net/client/jobs/managing): Running, cancelling, and monitoring job state
- [FAQ](https://www.shinylib.net/client/jobs/faq): Jobs frequently asked questions and troubleshooting

### Locations

- [GPS](https://www.shinylib.net/client/locations/gps): Real-time and background GPS location tracking
- [Geofencing](https://www.shinylib.net/client/locations/geofencing): Setting up geofence regions and monitoring enter/exit events

### HTTP Transfers

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/client/httptransfers/): Background HTTP upload and download transfers
- [Transfers](https://www.shinylib.net/client/httptransfers/transfers): Creating and configuring upload/download transfers
- [Monitoring](https://www.shinylib.net/client/httptransfers/monitoring): Monitoring transfer progress and completion

### Local Notifications

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/client/notifications/): Introduction to cross-platform local notifications
- [Sending Notifications](https://www.shinylib.net/client/notifications/sending): Creating and sending local notifications
- [Channels](https://www.shinylib.net/client/notifications/channels): Notification channel configuration for Android
- [Scheduling & Triggers](https://www.shinylib.net/client/notifications/scheduling): Scheduling notifications with time, interval, and location triggers

### Push Notifications

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/client/push/): Setting up push notifications with native, Firebase, or Azure Notification Hubs
- [Native](https://www.shinylib.net/client/push/native): Native push provider using Firebase on Android and APNs on iOS
- [Azure Push Notifications](https://www.shinylib.net/client/push/azure): Push notifications with Azure Notification Hubs for tag-based targeting and templates
- [Firebase (iOS)](https://www.shinylib.net/client/push/firebase-ios): Firebase Cloud Messaging push provider for iOS with topic subscription support
- [FAQ](https://www.shinylib.net/client/push/faq): Push notification troubleshooting and frequently asked questions

### OBD (On-Board Diagnostics)

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/client/obd): Introduction to OBD-II vehicle diagnostics over Bluetooth
- [Commands](https://www.shinylib.net/client/obd/commands): Sending and receiving OBD-II diagnostic commands
- [Connection & Adapters](https://www.shinylib.net/client/obd/connection): Discovering and connecting to ELM327 OBD adapters
- [BLE Transport](https://www.shinylib.net/client/obd/ble): Using Bluetooth LE as the OBD transport layer
- [Custom Transports](https://www.shinylib.net/client/obd/transports): Implementing custom OBD transport protocols
- [Release Notes](https://www.shinylib.net/client/obd/release-notes): OBD library release notes and changelog

### Music

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/client/music/): Cross-platform music library access for iOS and Android
- [Permissions](https://www.shinylib.net/client/music/permissions): Requesting music library permissions
- [Querying Music](https://www.shinylib.net/client/music/querying): Querying albums, artists, playlists, and tracks
- [Playback](https://www.shinylib.net/client/music/playback): Playing tracks from the device music library
- [Copying Tracks](https://www.shinylib.net/client/music/copying): Copying music tracks to app storage
- [Release Notes](https://www.shinylib.net/client/music/release-notes): Music library release notes and changelog

### Configuration

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/client/configuration/): Cross-platform configuration with multiple providers
- [JSON Platform Bundle](https://www.shinylib.net/client/configuration/json): Loading configuration from bundled JSON files
- [Platform Preferences](https://www.shinylib.net/client/configuration/preferences): Using platform preferences as a configuration source
- [Remote Configuration](https://www.shinylib.net/client/configuration/remote): Loading configuration from remote endpoints

### Other Client Features

- [Stateful Services](https://www.shinylib.net/client/other/statefulservices): Services that persist state across app restarts
- [Startup Services](https://www.shinylib.net/client/other/startupservices): Services that run during app initialization
- [Lifecycle Hooks](https://www.shinylib.net/client/other/lifecyclehooks): Hooking into application and platform lifecycle events
- [Android Foreground Services](https://www.shinylib.net/client/other/androidforeground): Keeping your app running in the background with a persistent notification on Android

## Mediator

- [Introduction](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/): Overview of Shiny Mediator — a source-generated, AOT-ready mediator pattern for all .NET apps
- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/getting-started): Installing and configuring Shiny Mediator
- [Requests](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/requests): Sending requests and receiving responses through the mediator
- [Commands](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/commands): Sending fire-and-forget commands
- [Streams](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/streams): Streaming data with IAsyncEnumerable through the mediator
- [Events](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/events): Publishing and subscribing to events
- [Exception Handling](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/exceptionhandlers): Centralized exception handling for mediator operations
- [Contract Keys](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/contractkeys): Using contract keys for targeted handler resolution
- [Source Generation (AOT)](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/sourcegeneration): AOT-compatible source generation for mediator contracts
- [Execution Contexts](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/context): Working with execution context data in mediator pipelines
- [Advanced](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/advanced): Advanced mediator patterns and techniques
- [Release Notes](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/release-notes): Shiny Mediator release notes and changelog

### Mediator Middleware

- [Introduction](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/middleware/): Overview of the mediator middleware pipeline
- [Validation](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/middleware/validation): Request validation middleware using FluentValidation
- [Caching](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/middleware/caching): Response caching middleware with attribute-driven configuration
- [Resiliency](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/middleware/resilience): Retry and circuit breaker middleware using Polly
- [Offline](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/middleware/offline): Offline-capable middleware that queues requests when disconnected
- [Performance Logging](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/middleware/performancelogging): Logging middleware for tracking handler execution time
- [Main Thread](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/middleware/mainthread): Middleware to dispatch handler execution to the main/UI thread
- [Replay](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/middleware/replay): Replay last cached result middleware
- [Refresh Timer](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/middleware/refresh): Periodic auto-refresh middleware for request handlers
- [Event Sample](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/middleware/sample): Event sampling middleware to throttle event processing
- [Event Throttle](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/middleware/throttle): Event throttling middleware
- [Command Scheduling](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/middleware/scheduling): Deferred command execution middleware
- [Middleware Ordering](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/middleware/ordering): Controlling the order of middleware in the pipeline

### Mediator HTTP

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/http/): Mapping mediator contracts to HTTP endpoints
- [Request Contracts](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/http/contracts): Defining HTTP request contracts with attributes
- [Decorators](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/http/decorators): Customizing HTTP endpoint behavior with decorators
- [OpenAPI Generation](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/http/openapi): Generating OpenAPI/Swagger documentation from mediator contracts
- [Configuration & AOT](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/http/configuration): HTTP extension configuration and AOT support

### Mediator Extensions

- [Overview](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/extensions/): Overview of available mediator platform extensions
- [MAUI](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/extensions/maui): Mediator integration for .NET MAUI applications
- [Blazor](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/extensions/blazor): Mediator integration for Blazor applications
- [Uno Platform](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/extensions/unoplatform): Mediator integration for Uno Platform applications
- [ASP.NET Core](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/extensions/aspnet): Mediator integration for ASP.NET Core applications
- [Prism](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/extensions/prism): Mediator integration for Prism MVVM framework
- [Dapper](https://www.shinylib.net/mediator/extensions/dapper): Mediator integration with Dapper for database operations

## MAUI Toolkit

### Shell

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/maui/shell/): Opinionated .NET MAUI Shell navigation with source generation
- [Navigation](https://www.shinylib.net/maui/shell/navigation): Strongly-typed Shell navigation with source-generated routes
- [Dialogs](https://www.shinylib.net/maui/shell/dialogs): Dialog services for alerts, action sheets, and prompts
- [ViewModel Lifecycle](https://www.shinylib.net/maui/shell/lifecycle): ViewModel lifecycle management with appearing/disappearing events
- [Source Generation](https://www.shinylib.net/maui/shell/sourcegen): Source generators for Shell routes, pages, and ViewModels
- [Release Notes](https://www.shinylib.net/maui/shell/release-notes): MAUI Shell release notes and changelog

### TableView

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/maui/tableview/): Pure MAUI settings-style TableView with 14 cell types
- [Cell Types](https://www.shinylib.net/maui/tableview/cells): Available cell types including switch, slider, text, date, and more
- [Sections & Dynamic Content](https://www.shinylib.net/maui/tableview/sections): Organizing cells into sections with headers, footers, and templates
- [Styling](https://www.shinylib.net/maui/tableview/styling): Cascading styles for consistent TableView appearance
- [Advanced Features](https://www.shinylib.net/maui/tableview/advanced): Drag-to-sort, swipe actions, and custom cell templates
- [Release Notes](https://www.shinylib.net/maui/tableview/release-notes): TableView release notes and changelog

### Contact Store

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/maui/contactstore/): Cross-platform device contact access with full CRUD
- [Permissions](https://www.shinylib.net/maui/contactstore/permissions): Requesting contact access permissions on iOS and Android
- [Querying](https://www.shinylib.net/maui/contactstore/querying): LINQ-style contact queries with native translation
- [Release Notes](https://www.shinylib.net/maui/contactstore/release-notes): Contact Store release notes and changelog

### Templates

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/maui/templates/): Shiny project templates for scaffolding fully configured MAUI apps
- [Shiny Libraries](https://www.shinylib.net/maui/templates/shiny-libraries): Shiny library options available in the template
- [3rd Party Libraries](https://www.shinylib.net/maui/templates/third-party): Third-party package options included in the template
- [Release Notes](https://www.shinylib.net/maui/templates/release-notes): Templates release notes and changelog

## Data

### Document DB

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/data/documentdb/): Lightweight document database storing .NET objects as JSON with SQLite, SQL Server, MySQL, and PostgreSQL
- [AOT Setup](https://www.shinylib.net/data/documentdb/aot): Configuring Document DB for AOT compilation
- [CRUD Operations](https://www.shinylib.net/data/documentdb/crud): Creating, reading, updating, and deleting documents
- [Querying](https://www.shinylib.net/data/documentdb/querying): LINQ-style document queries with filtering and sorting
- [Projections & Streaming](https://www.shinylib.net/data/documentdb/projections): Document projections and streaming query results
- [Aggregates](https://www.shinylib.net/data/documentdb/aggregates): Count, sum, min, max, and average aggregate operations
- [Indexes & Transactions](https://www.shinylib.net/data/documentdb/indexes): Creating indexes and using transactions for data integrity
- [SQLCipher (Encrypted)](https://www.shinylib.net/data/documentdb/sqlcipher): Using SQLCipher for encrypted document storage
- [Release Notes](https://www.shinylib.net/data/documentdb/release-notes): Document DB release notes and changelog

### Spatial

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/data/spatial/): Dependency-free spatial database using SQLite R*Tree indexing
- [Geometry Types](https://www.shinylib.net/data/spatial/geometry): Points, lines, polygons, and other supported geometry types
- [Database Operations](https://www.shinylib.net/data/spatial/database): Creating and managing spatial databases
- [Querying](https://www.shinylib.net/data/spatial/queries): Spatial queries including bounding box, radius, and intersection
- [Algorithms & Serialization](https://www.shinylib.net/data/spatial/algorithms): Spatial algorithms (distance, area, contains) and data serialization
- [Pre-built Databases](https://www.shinylib.net/data/spatial/prebuilt): Shipping pre-built spatial datasets with your application
- [Geofencing](https://www.shinylib.net/data/spatial/geofencing): Using spatial data for geofencing scenarios
- [Release Notes](https://www.shinylib.net/data/spatial/release-notes): Spatial library release notes and changelog

## Extensions

### Reflector

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/extensions/reflector/): Source-generated property access eliminating reflection for AOT-safe code
- [JSON Serialization](https://www.shinylib.net/extensions/reflector/json): Source-generated JSON serialization helpers
- [Assembly Info](https://www.shinylib.net/extensions/reflector/assembly-info): Source-generated assembly metadata access
- [Configuration](https://www.shinylib.net/extensions/reflector/configuration): Reflector source generator configuration options
- [Release Notes](https://www.shinylib.net/extensions/reflector/release-notes): Reflector release notes and changelog

### Dependency Injection

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/extensions/di/): Attribute-driven DI registration with source generation
- [Advanced Registration](https://www.shinylib.net/extensions/di/advanced): Advanced service registration patterns and techniques
- [Categories](https://www.shinylib.net/extensions/di/categories): Organizing service registrations into categories
- [Configuration](https://www.shinylib.net/extensions/di/configuration): DI source generator configuration options
- [Release Notes](https://www.shinylib.net/extensions/di/release-notes): DI Extensions release notes and changelog

### Stores

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/extensions/stores/): Cross-platform key/value store abstraction for Preferences, Secure Storage, and more
- [Persistent Services](https://www.shinylib.net/extensions/stores/persistent-services): Binding service properties to persistent storage automatically
- [Release Notes](https://www.shinylib.net/extensions/stores/release-notes): Stores release notes and changelog

### Localization Generator

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/extensions/localizegen/): Strongly-typed localization classes generated from .resx files
- [Usage Examples](https://www.shinylib.net/extensions/localizegen/usage): Examples of using generated localization classes
- [Release Notes](https://www.shinylib.net/extensions/localizegen/release-notes): Localization Generator release notes and changelog

### Web Hosting

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/extensions/webhost/): Modular ASP.NET Core configuration with IWebModule
- [Release Notes](https://www.shinylib.net/extensions/webhost/release-notes): Web Hosting release notes and changelog

### MAUI Hosting

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/extensions/mauihost/): Modular MAUI app configuration with IMauiModule and lifecycle dispatch
- [Release Notes](https://www.shinylib.net/extensions/mauihost/release-notes): MAUI Hosting release notes and changelog

## Aspire

### Orleans

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/aspire/orleans/): Simplified Orleans hosting for .NET Aspire
- [Hosting (AppHost)](https://www.shinylib.net/aspire/orleans/hosting): Configuring Orleans in the Aspire AppHost
- [Server (Silo)](https://www.shinylib.net/aspire/orleans/server): Setting up the Orleans Silo server
- [Client](https://www.shinylib.net/aspire/orleans/client): Configuring Orleans client connections
- [Release Notes](https://www.shinylib.net/aspire/orleans/release-notes): Aspire Orleans release notes and changelog

### Gluetun VPN

- [Getting Started](https://www.shinylib.net/aspire/gluetun/): Gluetun VPN container as a first-class Aspire resource
- [Configuration](https://www.shinylib.net/aspire/gluetun/configuration): Configuring Gluetun VPN provider settings
- [Container Routing](https://www.shinylib.net/aspire/gluetun/routing): Routing other Aspire containers through the VPN tunnel
- [Release Notes](https://www.shinylib.net/aspire/gluetun/release-notes): Gluetun VPN release notes and changelog

## App Builder

- [App Builder](https://www.shinylib.net/appbuilder/): Interactive tool to generate boilerplate configuration for Shiny libraries
